texto: You’re not going to disappear,” I said. “I won’t let you”.“Even if this is all there is? Going to school and working at my uncle’s restaurant and fighting with Mari? Why would anyone want to remember this?”“I want to remember you. Just like this.”She rolled onto her back, hands covering her face, and I pulled them away.“People like you don’t disappear,” I said.“Then where do they go?”“Everywhere.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laekan Zea Kemp: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “You’re not going to disappear,” I said. “I won’t let you”.“Even if this is all there is? Going to…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, contemporary, death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e trabalho.

texto: Then he kissed her without breathing, without thinking. He kissed her until his entire body was tingling from the taste of her.
